mano_cua.result_summary: log scale功能可用（checkbox切换、URL更新正常），但渲染有bug：启用log scale后所有数据点挤在图表上半部分，下半部分大面积空白。Y轴最小值(7M)设置过低导致数据可视化不佳。线性模式正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Log scale checkbox works functionally but has rendering bug. Data points (~30M-120M) are crowded in upper portion of chart. Log scale y-axis minimum set too low (7M), causing poor space utilization. Linear scale works correctly.
